bead.title: review: 'Use as edit prompt' handoff to Story 15 (or 'Create follow-up bead' fallback)
bead.description: From a review finding, 'Use as edit prompt' submits via Story 15's operatorPromptSubmit. If Story 15 isn't shipped yet, fallback: 'Create follow-up bead' that files a regular task bead with the finding text. Avoids dead-end UX.
bead.acceptance: 1. Use-as-edit-prompt button visible per finding. 2. If Story 15 mutations available, submits there. 3. Otherwise creates follow-up bead. 4. e2e covers both paths.
